name: Uber Freight
description: Uber Freight is a digital freight brokerage platform providing 24/7 access to truckload freight with instant quoting and booking, real-time shipment visibility, lane management, and carrier network pricing.

itemListElement.name: Uber Freight Loads API
itemListElement.description: Core REST API for generating price quotes for truckload shipments, tendering loads to Uber Freight's carrier network, and cancelling tenders. Returns guaranteed spot rates with expiration timestamps. Requires the freight.loads OAuth 2.0 scope.

itemListElement.name: Uber Freight Scheduling API
itemListElement.description: Scheduling API implementing the Scheduling Standards Consortium (SSC) Technical Standard for automated dock appointment booking across Uber Freight's TMS network of 1,500+ facilities.

itemListElement.name: Uber Freight Real-Time Tracking API
itemListElement.description: Provides real-time shipment visibility from pickup through delivery across Uber Freight's carrier network.
